name: VIRCO MFG CORPORATION
summary: Virco Mfg. Corporation is the largest manufacturer and supplier of moveable educational furniture and equipment for the preschool through 12th grade market in the United States. Founded in 1950, Virco designs and distributes chairs, desks, tables, and storage equipment. It also serves colleges, convention centers, hospitality, government facilities, and places of worship, manufacturing products in Torrance, California and Conway, Arkansas.

products.name: ZUMA Series
products.description: Best-selling classroom furniture series designed for contemporary educational applications.

products.name: Analogy and Civitas Collections
products.description: Furniture collections designed for educational settings by Peter Glass and Bob Mills.

products.name: Metaphor and Sage Series
products.description: Furniture items designed for educational environments.

products.name: Plateau Series
products.description: Media tables with TV mounts, USB and power ports for collaborative environments in schools and workplaces.

products.name: Text Series
products.description: Wide-ranging furniture series for educational settings.

products.name: Topaz Series
products.description: Teacher-focused classroom furniture line including desk, cart, mobile bookcases, storage, and sit-to-stand workstations.

products.name: Room to Move (R2M) Collection
products.description: Flexible seating furniture line including floor rockers, mobile task chairs, and sit-to-stand workstations for active classrooms.

products.name: Choose to Move (C2M) 4-Leg Chair
products.description: Patented flexible seating chair with mode selector switching between fixed and active seating modes.

products.name: 4000 and 5000 Series Collaborative Activity Tables
products.description: Adjustable-height activity tables in expanded shapes and sizes for flexible classroom spaces.

products.name: PlanSCAPE
products.description: Proprietary software enabling design, layout, and project management for campus furniture delivery and setup.
